posts.raw_content:
"Property. This term in its particular application means “that dominion which one man claims and exercises over the external things of the world, in exclusion of every other individual.”


In its larger and juster meaning, it embraces every thing to which a man may attach a value and have a right; and which leaves to every one else the like advantage.


In the former sense, a man’s land, or merchandize, or money is called his property.


In the latter sense, a man has a property in his opinions and the free communication of them.


He has a property of peculiar value in his religious opinions, and in the profession and practice dictated by them.


He has a property very dear to him in the safety and liberty of his person.


He has an equal property in the free use of his faculties and free choice of the objects on which to employ them.


In a word, as a man is said to have a right to his property, he may be equally said to have a property in his rights..." —MADISON Property (1792) “Artifex Maximus”


[My private property] [coequal commons aka joint] [Your private property]


We each own our properties with highest title "as nature and nature's god entitles." None superior. None subordinate. 


We guaranty to each other mutual security. 

Mutual security consists of a two part combination of: 1)  Not breaching 2) Defening.  

This is our American Mutual Security Compact. Peers.
 
Where 1 is the security of every individual's properties:


1[1x1x1x1] = 1 true. security of each individual, is security of all individuals...it scales infinitely. Separate and Equal regardless of attribute. 


Versus


Euro-Rousseau's  "The Social Contract" of collective superior to subordinate inferiors.  


[1+1+1+1+1] = [5] true,  


[3>2] = [5] false. That's ruinous Engels dialectical materialism pack hunting. 


Its a ruinous premise. It can't multiply forward. 


The the 3 of you guys destroy the other two. Now there's three. 
[2>1] = [3] false again. Another split. 


The power structure of Socialism is a closed system that eats itself. A jurisdiction can't run on divide and conquer. Interspecies predation is naturally unlawful.    


No Charge | No Sponsors foreign or domestic | Don't subscribe | TLDR Published as a matter of civic duty to destroy Rousseau/Austin/Engels Socialism within America  


https://chavezatomics.substack.com/p/americas-root-and-seed-property-abridged
